Header.Title: Baraa Alshaer
Header.Subtitle: Software Developer
Header.Description1: I am a Full-Stack Developer from Palestine . With a deep passion for backend, I specialize in building seamless and efficient web applications across both the front-end and back-end.
Header.Description2: I approach each project with a focus on delivering high-quality solutions, combining my skills in frontend development, backend systems, and overall project design. My aim is to create user-centric applications that not only meet client needs but also drive innovation.
Header.Description3: I am dedicated to staying current with industry trends and continuously improving my craft. My work reflects a commitment to excellence and a drive to contribute meaningfully to the tech community.

Experience.Title: Work experience
Experience.Subtitle: I have been fortunate to work with some amazing teams. I have worked mostly with startups. Here is a brief overview of my employment history.

Company.Description1: I served as a Frontend React Developer, where I was responsible for developing the primary website for Sustainable Star LLC and contributed significantly to the SFB project.
Company.Description2: I worked as a React Developer, where I was responsible for rebuilding and updating several projects, as well as developing new projects.
Company.Description3: I completed an internship at GEDCO as a Software Engineer through my college.

Projects.Project1.Title: Naj training center
Projects.Project1.Description: Dedicated center for dental education in Saudi Arabia.
Projects.ProjectsHeadline: I have worked on a variety of projects; Here are some of the projects that I have worked on.
Projects.Project2.Title: Gradients CSS
Projects.Project2.Description: A sophisticated gradient tool designed for both designers and developers.
Projects.Project3.Title: Rove
Projects.Project3.Description: A comprehensive full-stack e-commerce web application, featuring a complete suite of functionalities for managing products, processing transactions, and providing an engaging user experience.
Projects.Project4.Title: Sustainable Star
Projects.Project4.Description: A dynamic website developed for Sustainable Star, a startup focused on sustainability, designed to effectively communicate their mission and engage their audience.
Projects.Project5.Title: Bookstore API
Projects.Project5.Description: A RESTful API for a bookstore that efficiently manages users, authors, and books, offering robust endpoints for comprehensive data handling and integration.

ProjectsSection.Title: Projects
ProjectsSection.Description: I've worked on many of little projects but these are the ones that I'm proud of. Many of them are open-source, so if you see something that piques your interest, check out the code and contribute if you have ideas on how it can be improved.
